name: ABS Wheel Speed Sensor - Front
notes: Often seized in knuckle—may break on removal.

name: ABS Tone Ring
notes: Frequently integral to hub or axle (may require hub/axle service).

name: Brake Bleed - All Four
notes: ABS-equipped may require scan-tool automated bleed.

name: Brake Caliper Bracket
notes: Bracket bolts are often very tight / one-time torque.

name: Brake Caliper - Rear
notes: EPB caliper: deactivate via scan tool first.

name: Brake Drum - Rear
notes: Back off adjuster if drum is seized on shoes.

name: Brake Light Switch
notes: At the brake pedal under dash.

name: Brake Master Cylinder
notes: Bench-bleed before install; then system bleed.

name: Brake Pad Replacement (Rear)
notes: EPB models: retract via scan tool.

name: Brake Pads - Rear
notes: Integrated/electronic parking brake needs wind-back tool or scan tool.

name: Brake Caliper Rebuild - Rear
notes: Harder due to integrated parking-brake mechanism.

name: Electronic Parking Brake Motor
notes: Must enter service mode via scan tool; calibrate after.

name: Parking Brake Shoes
notes: Drum-in-hat style on many rear-disc vehicles.

name: Coolant Bypass Pipe
notes: Often tucked under intake—access can be tight.

name: Coolant Temperature Sensor
notes: Some drain coolant below sensor first.

name: Cooling Fan Assembly
notes: May need to drop coolant level / remove hose.

name: Cooling Fan Clutch
notes: RWD/truck mechanical fans; large thin wrenches needed.

name: Engine Oil Cooler
notes: Many are oil-to-coolant; service both fluids.

name: Heater Core
notes: Usually requires full dash removal — one of the most labor-intensive jobs.

name: Heater Hoses
notes: Routing can be tight against firewall.

name: Radiator
notes: Bleed after; watch trans cooler lines on autos.

name: Water Pump
notes: If timing-belt-driven, replace belt at same time.

name: CV Axle - Front
notes: Some require lower ball joint/knuckle separation.

name: CV Boot - Outer
notes: Often easier/cheaper to replace whole axle.

name: Differential Cover Gasket
notes: Clean mating surface; refill to spec.

name: Ring and Pinion
notes: Specialist: set backlash + pinion depth + pattern.

name: Airbag - Driver
notes: Disconnect battery, wait per spec; handle away from body; clear codes.

name: Airbag Module/Computer
notes: Often needs programming; crash-data lockout on deployed modules.

name: Battery Cable - Positive
notes: Trace to starter/distribution; disconnect battery first.

name: Battery Replacement
notes: Alias of battery; some need battery registration (BMS).

name: Clock Spring
notes: Disconnect battery + wait; center before install; SRS.

name: Headlight Assembly
notes: Often bumper/grille loosened for access; aim after.

name: Power Seat Motor
notes: Seat out; SRS if occupancy sensor.

name: Wiper Motor - Front
notes: Cowl panel off; mark park position.

name: Oxygen Sensor Replacement
notes: Often seized in hot exhaust bung; heat to free. Don't get anti-seize on the tip.

name: Cylinder Head Resurface
notes: Head removed; resurface at machine shop.

name: Engine Mounts - All
notes: Do one at a time, engine supported.

name: Exhaust Manifold Gasket
notes: Studs commonly snap — plan for extraction.

name: Freeze Plug - Single
notes: Rear plugs may need engine/trans out.

name: Freeze Plugs - All
notes: Rear bank plugs often need engine partially out.

name: Head Gasket - Single
notes: Check head flatness; TTY torque sequence.

name: Intake Manifold
notes: Plastic manifolds crack at coolant ports.

name: Knock Sensor
notes: Frequently under the intake manifold — adds significant labor.

name: Lifter - Single
notes: Access varies; OHC may need cam out.

name: Lifters/Tappets - All
notes: Top-end teardown; common on AFM/DOD engines.

name: Oil Level Sensor
notes: In oil pan; drain oil first.

name: Oil Pump
notes: Usually behind timing cover; prime on install.

name: Rocker Arms - All
notes: OHC engines may need cam removal.

name: Connecting Rod Bearings
notes: Oil pan off; engine often partly out.

name: Throttle Body
notes: Throttle relearn after on many vehicles.

name: Timing Belt
notes: Interference engines bend valves if mistimed.

name: Turbocharger
notes: Prime oil before start; ensure clean oil supply.

name: Valve Cover Gaskets - Both
notes: V-engines; intake often must come off.

name: Valve Seals
notes: On-vehicle with air-hold; tedious per cylinder.

name: Battery Coolant Flush
notes: Pack thermal loop; bleed per OEM.

name: Battery Disconnect Service
notes: Remove HV service disconnect + verify zero volts (prereq for most HV work).

name: DC-DC Converter
notes: HV-to-12V converter; HV safety + coolant service.

name: High Voltage Battery Module R&R
notes: Specialist HV work; pack opened. Cell balancing/coding after.

name: High Voltage Battery Pack R&R
notes: Heavy + dangerous; specialist/dealer-level. Full lockout + verify zero volts.

name: Charge Port Assembly
notes: DC contacts can be HV-connected; de-energize per OEM.

name: DC Fast Charge Port
notes: HV DC; service-disconnect + verify zero volts.

name: High Voltage Service Disconnect
notes: Removal de-energizes pack; verify with meter.

name: Pyrotechnic Fuse Inspection
notes: Pyrotechnic HV disconnect; replace if triggered.

name: Inverter R&R
notes: HV power electronics; lockout + verify de-energized.

name: EV Annual Inspection
notes: Includes HV isolation + coolant + brake checks.

name: EV Software Update
notes: OTA or tool-based; ensure stable power.

name: Catalytic Converter - California
notes: CARB-legal cat (required in CA and CARB states).

name: Catalytic Converter - Universal
notes: Weld-in; must be emissions-compliant for the vehicle.

name: Diesel Particulate Filter
notes: Clean/replace + forced regen. Must remain emissions-compliant.

name: DPF Delete Pipe
notes: EXCLUDED — removing/defeating a diesel particulate filter on an on-road vehicle violates the Clean Air Act (and CARB). HMLS should not quote or perform this. Flagged so it never enters customer-facing estimates.

name: Front Pipe
notes: Flange bolts at manifold often seized.

name: O2 Sensor - Upstream
notes: Seized bung common; heat to free.

name: Fuel Filter - In-Tank
notes: Access panel or drop tank; relieve pressure.

name: Fuel Injector - Single
notes: GDI injectors need new seals + sometimes coding.

name: Fuel Injectors - All
notes: Rail off; GDI coding on some.

name: Fuel Pump
notes: Access panel or drop tank; relieve pressure.

name: Fuel Tank
notes: Drain/empty tank first; major fire-safety job.

name: High Pressure Fuel Pump
notes: GDI; cam-lobe-driven. Relieve high-side pressure carefully.

name: AC Compressor
notes: Flush system if compressor failed (debris). EPA 609.

name: AC Compressor Clutch
notes: Set air gap; may not need to open refrigerant circuit.

name: AC Compressor Oil Add
notes: Balance oil charge per system spec; EPA 609.

name: AC Condenser
notes: Front of vehicle, behind grille; EPA 609.

name: AC System Evacuate and Recharge
notes: Vacuum ≥30 min to remove moisture; EPA 609.

name: AC Evaporator
notes: Usually full dash removal — very high labor. EPA 609.

name: AC Expansion Valve (TXV)
notes: Often at firewall/evaporator box — access can be deep. EPA 609.

name: AC High Pressure Switch
notes: Many are Schrader-mounted — no need to discharge.

name: AC Receiver/Drier
notes: Replace whenever system is opened; EPA 609.

name: AC Recharge
notes: EPA 609 required. Diagnose leaks before recharging.

name: HVAC Control Panel
notes: Dash bezel removal; some need programming.

name: Distributor
notes: Mark position; set base timing after (distributor engines).

name: Ignition Switch
notes: Column work; some need key/immobilizer relearn.

name: Spark Plug Wires
notes: Replace one at a time to keep firing order.

name: Spark Plugs - V6
notes: Rear bank on transverse V6 often needs intake/wiper cowl off.

name: 100K Service
notes: Major milestone service; include timing belt if due.

name: Brake Fluid Service
notes: Flush old fluid through all 4 corners.

name: Check Engine Light Diagnosis
notes: Code + symptom diagnosis; may need smoke/pressure tests.

name: Compression Test
notes: Remove all plugs; crank each cylinder.

name: Fuel Filter
notes: Relieve fuel pressure first; in-tank filters are a bigger job.

name: Oil Change - Diesel
notes: High oil capacity; may have secondary/bypass filter.

name: Tire Rotation
notes: Re-torque to spec; reset TPMS if position-based.

name: Transmission Service
notes: Many modern units need fluid-level set at temperature.

name: Rack and Pinion Boots
notes: Mark inner tie-rod position; alignment after.

name: Steering Angle Sensor
notes: Calibrate (SAS reset) after; affects stability control.

name: Steering Column
notes: Disable SRS; center clockspring; SAS calibrate after.

name: Leaf Spring
notes: Support axle; rusted U-bolts often snap.

name: Leaf Spring U-Bolt Kit
notes: Torque to spec; often replaced with springs.

name: Lower Control Arm
typicalParts: Lower control arm (often w/ ball joint & bushings)

name: Torsion Bar
notes: Mark indexing; reset ride height + alignment.

name: Neutral Safety Switch
notes: Adjust so it starts only in P/N.

name: Torque Converter
notes: Trans out; fully seat converter on pump.

name: Transmission Fluid Change
notes: Many sealed units set fill level at temp.

name: Transmission Flush
notes: Machine exchange; avoid on high-mileage neglected units.

name: Valve Body
notes: Keep bolts organized; adaptive relearn after.
